bio: Results-driven product manager focused on building impactful digital products from concept to launch. Passionate about aligning user needs with business goals and leading cross-functional teams to deliver exceptional solutions.
name: DANIELLE MORRIS
title: Product Manager

projects.title: SaaS Platform Launch
projects.description: Led the development and launch of a SaaS product from ideation to market release.

projects.title: Conversion Optimization Initiative
projects.description: Implemented A/B testing strategies to improve product conversion rates.

projects.title: Mobile App Feature Rollout
projects.description: Managed feature releases and coordinated cross-team efforts for a mobile application.

community.description: Mentored aspiring product managers on product strategy and career growth.
Delivered talks on product development and agile practices.

education.description: Specialized in product management, marketing, and business strategy.
Focused on agile product development and user-centered design.

highlights: Collaborated with engineering and design teams.
Analyzed product performance and user feedback.
experience.description: Driving product success from ideation to execution.

highlights: Supported product planning and feature prioritization.
Conducted user research and usability testing.
Assisted in sprint planning and backlog grooming.
experience.description: Supported product lifecycle and agile development.

highlights: Analyzed business data to identify trends.
